title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Vistara - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Vistara - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Vistara is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vistara:
Vistara is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vistara!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
